name: Hartej Singh
tagline: Photography, writing, and video — and I'm available to work with you.
pitch: Available for photography shoots, writing commissions, and YouTube collaborations.
bio: I'm Hartej — a creator working across photography, fiction, music, and video. I shoot portraits, landscapes, and events; write long-form fiction and commissioned pieces; and make gaming and guitar content on YouTube. If you like what you see, let's work together.
